title: Asset Return Checklist
text:
## Asset Return Checklist

Employee: {person}

Please return the following by {day of week}: one {adjective} laptop, {number} chargers, a {color} badge, and the mysterious {object} from your desk.

Before shipping, {verb} all files to the approved {place} and stop {verb ending in -ing} company data onto {plural noun}.

Missing equipment will be replaced with a {adjective} invoice and a call from a {job}.

If you feel {emotion}, eat {food}, make a {sound}, and contact IT {adverb}.
